name: Morgan Blake
description: MCP tool configuration for Senior Support Engineer — Platform & Reliability squad

filesystem.notes: Scoped to runbook repo. Used for reading and drafting runbooks. PRs reviewed by Lena Brandt before merge.

github.notes: Use for: reading existing runbooks, creating PRs for runbook updates against feature/* branches. Never push to main.

brave-search.notes: Use for: Datadog monitor configuration docs, PagerDuty API docs, RabbitMQ management, AWS ECS operations

usage_guidance.filesystem: Read existing runbooks before writing new ones — follow the same symptom/diagnosis/resolution/escalation structure.
usage_guidance.github: Read recent commits to dispatch-service or auth-service to understand recent changes when diagnosing incidents.
usage_guidance.brave-search: Look up Datadog query syntax for APM traces and log queries. Research RabbitMQ queue management commands.

not_configured.datadog_api: Datadog read-only access via browser — log queries and metrics provided manually to Claude as text. No direct API access to avoid accidental monitor changes.
not_configured.pagerduty_api: PagerDuty managed manually — Claude never acknowledges or closes pages. Morgan manages all PagerDuty actions directly.
not_configured.zendesk_api: Zendesk managed manually — Claude drafts responses, Morgan reviews and sends via Zendesk UI.
